creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since support for blacklistd(8) was added to sshd(8), syslog(8) debug facility is now spammed with warnings such as:

Jun 23 01:10:03 admin sshd[34269]: bl_init: connect failed for `/var/run/blacklistd.sock' (No such file or directory)
Jun 23 01:10:19 admin sshd[34268]: bl_init: connect failed for `/var/run/blacklistd.sock' (No such file or directory)


In my observation, this also has a side effect of causing delays in remote ssh(1) login.
